august.name: August Smart Lock
august.blurb: Wi-Fi smart lock with rolling guest codes. We use it for unattended check-ins on three properties.
august.ftcDisclosure: We earn a small commission if you buy through this link. We only recommend gear we actually use.

schlage.name: Schlage Encode
schlage.blurb: Battery smart lock, no hub required. Solid choice for Airbnb hosts who don't want to deal with Z-Wave hubs.
schlage.ftcDisclosure: We earn a small commission if you buy through this link. We only recommend gear we actually use.

remotelock.name: RemoteLock
remotelock.blurb: PMS-integrated smart locks for hosts running 5+ properties. Pricier but worth it at scale.
remotelock.ftcDisclosure: We earn a small commission if you buy through this link. We only recommend gear we actually use.

minut.name: Minut
minut.blurb: Privacy-friendly noise + occupancy monitor. Doesn't record audio — just decibel events.
minut.ftcDisclosure: We earn a small commission if you buy through this link. We only recommend gear we actually use.

noiseaware.name: NoiseAware
noiseaware.blurb: Indoor + outdoor noise monitors built specifically for short-term rentals.
noiseaware.ftcDisclosure: We earn a small commission if you buy through this link. We only recommend gear we actually use.

hostfully.name: Hostfully
hostfully.blurb: Property management platform built for hosts running 5–50 units. Strong on automation and digital guest books.
hostfully.ftcDisclosure: We earn a small commission if you sign up through this link. We only recommend tools we'd use ourselves.

hospitable.name: Hospitable
hospitable.blurb: Auto-messaging + channel manager. Cleaner UX than the legacy PMS options for 1–10 unit hosts.
hospitable.ftcDisclosure: We earn a small commission if you sign up through this link. We only recommend tools we'd use ourselves.

ownerrez.name: OwnerRez
ownerrez.blurb: Most powerful direct-booking PMS on the market. Steeper learning curve, deeper feature set.
ownerrez.ftcDisclosure: We earn a small commission if you sign up through this link. We only recommend tools we'd use ourselves.

turno.name: Turno
turno.blurb: Find vetted Airbnb cleaners, auto-schedule turnovers from your calendar, run paid background-checks. Backup roster for our network.
turno.ftcDisclosure: We earn a small commission if you sign up through this link. We only recommend tools we'd use ourselves.
